name: 卡方检验
subject: math
domain_name: 统计与概率 / Stats & Probability / Stats & Prob
curriculum_points: Set up and perform a chi-squared test for independence, including calculating expected frequencies, degrees of freedom, and the p-value (AO3).
Interpret the result of a chi-squared test in context, understanding the meaning of statistical significance at a given level.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「卡方检验」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：Set up and perform a chi-squared test for independence, including calculating expected frequencies, degrees of freedom, …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：Interpret the result of a chi-squared test in context, understanding the meaning… 对理解「卡方检验」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
